archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury / Premium Gallery. Tailored for an older, sophisticated professional.

typography.fonts: Nunito (Primary/Body). Ensure elegant typesetting with tracking adjustments for uppercase elements.

subtitle.text: Inicia sesión para acceder a tu panel de administración

layout_proportions.container: min-h-screen w-full flex flex-col md:flex-row bg-background
layout_proportions.left_panel: hidden md:flex flex-col justify-end w-[50%] lg:w-[55%] relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-950
layout_proportions.right_panel: flex w-full md:w-[50%] lg:w-[45%] items-center justify-center p-6 md:p-12 lg:p-24
layout_proportions.form_wrapper: w-full max-w-sm mx-auto flex flex-col gap-8
layout_proportions.responsive: On mobile, the left image panel is hidden, and the right panel takes 100% width.

left_image_panel.image_classes: absolute inset-0 object-cover w-full h-full opacity-90
left_image_panel.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/30 to-transparent z-10
left_image_panel.logo_container: z-20 relative p-12 w-full text-center text-white flex flex-col items-center justify-center pb-16
left_image_panel.logo_design: Use Lucide 'Box' or 'Hexagon' icon (size 32, strokeWidth 1.5) + 'PRISMA STUDIO' in text-xl tracking-[0.2em] font-light uppercase mt-4.

right_login_panel.user_identity: Top left of the form wrapper: flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-semibold tracking-widest text-muted-foreground uppercase mb-2. Text: 'ALEJANDRO MARTÍNEZ / ESCULTOR'
right_login_panel.inputs: h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-soft-sm. Include left-aligned Lucide icons (Mail for email, Lock for password) inside the input wrapper with pl-10. Password must have an eye toggle on the right with pr-10.
right_login_panel.actions_row: flex items-center justify-between mt-4. Left: Checkbox 'Recordarme' with label. Right: Link '¿Olvidaste tu contraseña?' text-sm text-primary hover:underline.
right_login_panel.submit_cta: Button full width (w-full h-12 text-base mt-2 shadow-soft). Text: 'Iniciar sesión'. Mock functionality only.
right_login_panel.divider_helper: flex items-center gap-4 my-8 before:flex-1 before:border-t before:border-border after:flex-1 after:border-t after:border-border text-xs text-muted-foreground. Subtext: '¿No tienes cuenta? Contacta con tu administrador.'
right_login_panel.footer: text-xs text-center text-muted-foreground mt-8. Text: 'Desarrollado por Novatedi'

interactions.hover: CTA button hover opacity-90. Links hover text-primary/80.
interactions.testing: MANDATORY: Add data-testid attributes to all inputs, buttons, and links (e.g., 'login-email-input', 'login-submit-btn', 'login-forgot-password-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Create the login UI in standard JavaScript (.js/.jsx) - do NOT use .tsx, as specified in the CRITICAL RULES.
Implement the 2-column layout. The left column takes up to 55% width, the right takes 45%.
To fix the 'too wide' issue requested by the user, restrict the form container on the right side to `max-w-sm` (384px) centered with `mx-auto`.
Ensure the Prisma logo and text are at the BOTTOM CENTER of the left image panel over the dark gradient.
Include the brand block 'ALEJANDRO MARTÍNEZ / ESCULTOR' above the 'Bienvenido de nuevo' heading in the right panel.
Use Lucide icons to construct the Prisma logo, input icons, and password visibility toggle.
Ensure inputs are h-12 for better accessibility for older users.
This is a front-end only mock. The form submit should just prevent default and simulate success (e.g., navigate to a dashboard).
Apply all texts in Spanish exactly as specified.
Ensure compatibility with existing Tailwind variables (--background, --card, --primary, etc.) for flawless Dark/Light mode support.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements to support automated testing.
